news.t: First Trust Announces Shareholder Approval of New Investment Management Agreement for First Trust Global Engineering and Construction ETF and Upcoming Implementation of Certain Related Changes
First Trust Announces Adjournment of Special Shareholder Meeting for First Trust Global Engineering and Construction ETF

holdings.infoBox: RBLD is an equity ETF with a total of 104 individual holdings. The top holdings are Bloom Energy stock at 1.71%, Snowflake at 1.70%, Twilio at 1.45%, MongoDB at 1.40%, and Steel Dynamics at 1.37%.

overview.description: The First Trust Alerian US NextGen Infrastructure ETF (RBLD) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Alerian US NextGen Infrastructure index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index that comprises 100 of the largest US infrastructure companies selected by market capitalization. RBLD was launched on Oct 13, 2008 and is issued by First Trust.
